mapper.select:
WITH stock_move AS ( /* 입고 */ SELECT i.item_cd ,i.test_no ,m.tran_date ,m.src_storage_cd AS storage_cd ,i.qty AS qty FROM tb_inv_tran_item i JOIN tb_inv_tran_mst m ON i.tran_id = m.tran_id WHERE i.item_cd = #{itemCd} AND m.tran_status = 'C' AND m.src_storage_cd IS NOT NULL AND m.tran_type_cd IN ('A','B','C','I', 'J') UNION ALL /* 출고 */ SELECT i.item_cd ,i.test_no ,m.tran_date ,CASE WHEN m.tran_type_cd IN ('I','J','L') THEN m.tar_storage_cd ELSE m.src_storage_cd END AS storage_cd ,i.qty * -1 AS qty FROM tb_inv_tran_item i JOIN tb_inv_tran_mst m ON i.tran_id = m.tran_id WHERE i.item_cd = #{itemCd} AND m.tran_status = 'C' AND m.tar_storage_cd IS NOT NULL AND m.tran_type_cd IN ('D','E','F','G','L','Q','T','I', 'J') UNION ALL /* 조정 */ SELECT i.item_cd ,i.test_no ,m.tran_date ,m.src_storage_cd AS storage_cd ,i.qty AS qty FROM tb_inv_tran_item i JOIN tb_inv_tran_mst m ON i.tran_id = m.tran_id WHERE i.item_cd = #{itemCd} AND m.tran_status = 'C' AND m.src_storage_cd IS NOT NULL AND m.tran_type_cd IN ('P', 'R', 'S', 'U', 'V', 'W', 'X') ), base AS ( SELECT sm.item_cd ,sm.test_no ,sm.storage_cd ,SUM(sm.qty) AS qty FROM stock_move sm JOIN tb_storage_mst s ON sm.storage_cd = s.storage_cd WHERE s.area_cd = #{areaCd} AND ISNULL(s.use_yn, 'Y') = 'Y' GROUP BY sm.item_cd, sm.test_no, sm.storage_cd ), in_date AS ( SELECT i.item_cd ,i.test_no ,MIN(m.tran_date) AS in_date FROM tb_inv_tran_item i JOIN tb_inv_tran_mst m ON i.tran_id = m.tran_id WHERE i.item_cd = #{itemCd} AND m.tran_status = 'C' AND m.src_storage_cd IS NOT NULL GROUP BY i.item_cd, i.test_no ) SELECT b.item_cd AS itemCd ,b.test_no AS testNo ,d.in_date AS inDate ,(select expiry_date from tb_item_test_no where test_no = b.test_no) as expiryDate ,
SUM(CASE WHEN b.storage_cd = #{storageCd} THEN b.qty ELSE 0 END) AS [${storageCd}]
,
SUM(CASE WHEN b.storage_cd = #{storageCd} THEN b.qty ELSE 0 END) AS totQty
FROM base b LEFT JOIN in_date d ON b.item_cd = d.item_cd AND ISNULL(b.test_no, '') = ISNULL(d.test_no, '') GROUP BY b.item_cd, b.test_no, d.in_date HAVING
SUM(CASE WHEN b.storage_cd = #{storageCd} THEN b.qty ELSE 0 END) > 0 ORDER BY b.test_no

select a.item_cd ,b.item_name ,a.expiry_date ,a.test_no ,DATEDIFF(DAY, #{stdDate}, a.expiry_date) AS remaining_day ,c.customer_name ,a.create_date ,avg(b.in_price) as in_price ,isnull(sum(d.qty), 0) as qty ,isnull(sum(d.qty* b.in_price ), 0) as totPrice from tb_item_test_no a inner join tb_item_mst b on b.item_cd = a.item_cd left outer join tb_customer c on c.customer_cd = a.customer_cd left outer join vw_inv_stock_tran d on d.test_no = a.test_no where a.item_type_cd IN ( 'M2', 'M7')
AND a.expiry_date < DATEADD(MONTH, 3, #{stdDate})
AND a.expiry_date >= DATEADD(MONTH, 3, #{stdDate}) AND a.expiry_date < DATEADD(MONTH, 6, #{stdDate})
AND a.expiry_date >= DATEADD(MONTH, 6, #{stdDate}) AND a.expiry_date < DATEADD(MONTH, 12, #{stdDate})
AND a.expiry_date >= DATEADD(MONTH, 12, #{stdDate}) AND a.expiry_date < DATEADD(MONTH, 24, #{stdDate})
AND a.expiry_date >= DATEADD(MONTH, 24, #{stdDate})
AND a.area_cd LIKE '%' + #{areaCd} + '%'
AND a.item_cd LIKE '%' + #{itemCd} + '%'
AND b.item_name LIKE '%' + #{itemName} + '%'
group by a.item_cd, b.item_name, a.expiry_date, a.test_no, c.customer_name, a.create_date
